fields.summary: Creates an XPS document that writes to the specified write stream using the given options.
fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocument" /> for writing XPS content, or <see langword="null" /> if the document could not be created.

params.stream: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWStream" /> to write the XPS document to.
params.options: The options that control the XPS output, such as DPI and image encoding.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKDocument CreateXps (SkiaSharp.SKWStream stream, SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions options);

fields.summary: Creates an XPS document that writes to the specified managed stream using the given options.
fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocument" /> for writing XPS content, or <see langword="null" /> if the document could not be created.

params.stream: The <see cref="T:System.IO.Stream" /> to write the XPS document to.
params.options: The options that control the XPS output, such as DPI and image encoding.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKDocument CreateXps (System.IO.Stream stream, SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions options);

fields.summary: Creates an XPS document that writes to the specified file path using the given options.
fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocument" /> for writing XPS content, or <see langword="null" /> if the file could not be opened.

params.path: The path to the output XPS file.
params.options: The options that control the XPS output, such as DPI and image encoding.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKDocument CreateXps (string path, SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions options);
